_note_teamScopeFolders: Folder hierarchy for Team Scope sync tests (GTaskSheet-me6w.6). Create via the setup_team_scope_fixture GAS fixture, which also registers TestTeamA/TestTeamAChild in TeamData.
_note_axiom: Used by scripts/query_axiom.py and src/WebApp.js's set_axiom_config route. axiomToken is the ingest token (write-only, used by GasLogger.flush() server-side); axiomQueryToken is a separate read-only API token for querying — get both from the Axiom org settings.
_note_testToken: Auto-populated by npm run deploy:test — do not edit manually.
_note_webappTestUrl: Auto-written by npm run deploy:test from the TEST-WEB-APP deployment ID — do not set manually. deploy:test always overwrites this with the current derived URL so it cannot become stale.
